flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Barclay College are 30% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($36.4k vs $52.3k).

flags.label: Debt-to-earnings
flags.summary: Debt-to-earnings ratio of 8.9% at Barclay College exceeds the 8% gainful-employment threshold ($24.3k debt amortized over 10 years vs $36.4k earnings).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Barclay College fell 90% between 2021 and 2024 (33.3% → 3.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Barclay College fell 35% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 32.3%).
